transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Are you going to the career fair this afternoon?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. Several companies are offering internships, so I don't want to miss it.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the woman going to the career fair?

questions.prompt: Why is the woman going to the career fair?

choices.text: She wants to apply for internship opportunities.

questions.explanation: She says several companies are offering internships and she does not want to miss the event.
questions.evidence: Several companies are offering internships, so I don't want to miss it.
